The underlying behavior is preserved: Loid still quietly offers rescue food without embarrassing Yor. The new phrasing uses different syntax, sequencing, and lexicon — no reader could map it onto the style-bible calibration line.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 6 now keeps the Yor/Garden telepathic beat within surface-thought limits, trims the back-half stake recaps after Loid's suspicion and Sylvia's call, and closes on a concrete action that carries Bond's warning, the Damian/WISE lie, and Yor's buried doubt forward without abstract inventory.

Single finding addressed. Loid's fallback-meal dialogue and its confirming narration were rewritten to break the structural echo with the style-bible calibration example. The new lines preserve the character behavior (discreet rescue food offered without calling attention to the stew) while using materially different verbal fingerprint — no rice, no 'options' landing, different sentence architecture. All non-negotiables maintained: heading contract intact, no clipping, no over-formality, no sanitization, character voices preserved.

Analyst-register drift and repeated "specific" scaffolding were removed from the cited prose beats; the chapter now carries the same stakes in closer, more immediate language tied to Anya's domestic setting, bodily pressure, and present decisions.
